reviews.comment:
La mejor estación de servicio de Tinogasta.

(Translated by Google)
The best gas station in Tinogasta.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobE1XQUdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es el último lugar donde puedes cargar combustible de marca,  antes de seguir a Fiambala.  En ésta hay dos estaciones,  sin bandera y los lugareños evitan cargar,  por lo wow viajan al ACA Tinogasta

(Translated by Google)
It's the last place where you can get name-brand fuel before continuing on to Fiambalá. There are two independent stations there, and locals avoid filling up with branded fuel, so they travel to the ACA Tinogasta instead.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocU5EcnZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
una sola persona atendiendo, más de 60' por reloj para cargar nafta, así no salimos más muchachos!

(Translated by Google)
Only one person working, over 60 minutes just to fill up with gas, we're not going out like this anymore, guys!
